## Diet in Renal Disease {{< fa staff-snake >}}{.slide-project-mdrd .section-end}

CDC data from randomized clinical trials measuring the progression of chronic kidney disease with or without a modified diet.

::: notes
PROJECT: you'll be exploring the **effects of modified diet on renal disease**. With each week's lessons, we'll be building techniques to get better at asking and exploring how a modified diet affects patients with this condition.

The process we're following will be pretty clear once we get into it. By working on this project over multiple weeks, you'll **<i>gain skills</i>** as you **<i>apply them</i>**, all the while **<i>practicing</i>** as you go. ✻
:::
